title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Record of the Year Predictions
text: Current Odds for the Record of the Year category features competitive odds with significant movement leading up to the February 1, 2026 ceremony at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles. Top Contenders: Kendrick Lamar and SZA – "Luther" (-135), Lady Gaga – "Abracadabra" (+275), Bad Bunny – "DtMF" (+450), Rose and Bruno Mars – "APT" (+500). Key Analysis: The betting odds have shifted dramatically throughout the season. Lady Gaga's track was initially favored at -105 in November but has since fallen to +275, while Kendrick Lamar's collaboration with SZA moved into the favorite position. Expert Prediction: The article recommends betting on Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra" at +275 odds. The writer argues this represents an upset opportunity, noting the song demonstrates "really a sonic achievement" within her career trajectory and maintains widespread popularity that should reasonably place it at closer to even odds. The rationale: When quality music with strong cultural resonance carries +275 odds, the value proposition becomes compelling for bettors seeking higher returns on competitive categories.
